title: Cognitive Neuroscience and Abnormal Psychology
outline: This course aims to introduce students to a variety of topics relevant to normal cognitive functioning as well as psychopathology. While one half of the course takes a neuroscientific approach, the other half of the course draws on psychological, sociocultural, cognitive and biological perspectives.
lecture_times: See module block schedule and official class timetable.
dp_requirements: Completion of all coursework, attendance at all tutorials, and obtaining 3 points through the Student Research Participation Programme (SRPP).
assessment: Coursework: 70% (assignment submissions = 40% and class test = 30%) Exam: 30%.
